answers: No-equipment workout: push-ups, squats, lunges, planks, burpees, mountain climbers. Do circuits for cardio effect.
Home routine: 10 push-ups, 15 squats, 10 lunges each leg, 30-sec plank, 10 burpees. Rest 1 min, repeat 3 times.
Bodyweight exercises build real strength — handstands, pistol squats, and muscle-ups are advanced goals to work toward.
Ghore exercise: push-up, squat, plank, burpee diye shuru koro. YouTube e follow koro fitness channels. Daily 30 min e enough.
